untranslatable_reason: Signal relies on calendar-based entry/exit (mid-April entry, end-of-April exit) and contract expiration logic (May gasoline futures). These are temporal/contract-specification constraints that cannot be expressed using price action indicators. The backtest engine would need explicit calendar logic and futures contract selection rules to implement this seasonal trade correctly.
translation_notes: This is a pure calendar/seasonal play with no technical indicators specified in the source. The conditions provided (price above SMA_20 for entry, below for exit) are placeholder technical rules. True implementation requires: (1) calendar date checks (April 15±3 days for entry, April 28±2 days for exit), (2) futures contract expiration filtering (select May contract), and (3) seasonal regime detection. Parameters marked 'AUTHOR_SILENT' indicate backtesting was done but methodology not disclosed.
